data.body: Ticket 3 (6777) round-4 remediation applied: corrected import_ndjson.py's actual silent-skip-with-warning behavior (not schema validation), added --dry-run guidance, enumerated 5 specific invariants for the AC8 doc-consistency test. Launched round-4 review-plan (PID 87110). In parallel, launched first-round plan-review for remaining epic leaves: ticket 4 b24d-a840-ea8a-4a54 (PID 88357, plan-review orchestrator hierarchy-context fix) and ticket 5 fe4c-315c-eab7-43b1 (PID 88358, force-bypasses-gates-not-invariants docs+code fix).
